Name: Slice
Description: Slice debuted in All-New Venom #2 by Al Ewing and Carlos Gomez Guardsman Armor: Slice wears green guardsman armor Energy Weapon: His right gauntlet has an energy sawblade. Tentacles: When Doc Ock takes over SCAR, he outfits the field agents with robotic arms just like his.
